title: Industrial Engineering Trainee Internship in Pune
description:
Industrial Engineering Trainee | Process Excellence 📍 Pune

Are you a fresh engineering graduate with a sharp eye for efficiency and a passion for operational strategy? We are looking for an industrial engineering trainee to join our process excellence team. In this role, you won't just observe; you will actively help us optimize productivity, reduce waste, and refine the workflows that drive our success. Reporting directly to the process excellence manager, you will be at the heart of our continuous improvement initiatives.

Selected Intern's Day-to-day Responsibilities Include


Analyze & Optimize: Conduct time and motion studies to pinpoint and eliminate work inefficiencies.
Visualize Workflows: Support process mapping and identify critical bottlenecks in our production cycle.
Data-Driven Impact: Collect and transform operational data into actionable reports and executive presentations.
Standardization: Help draft standard operating procedures (SOPs) that define our "best-in-class" practices.
Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with production, quality, maintenance, and supply chain teams to execute cost-reduction projects.


Join us and accelerate your career in Process Excellence.

About Company: Arcatron Mobility Private Limited is creating innovative devices to enhance the lives of the elderly and mobility-impaired individuals. We are dedicated to uniquely addressing unmet needs. Our mission is to 'use technology to empower our consumers to lead a more active and safer lifestyle'.

title: Product Management-Intern
description:
Job Title - Product Management Intern (6-Month Internship)

Location - Pune, Baner

Department - Product

Internship Details - Duration 6 months

About The Role

We are looking for a Product Management Intern who is curious about how real-world products are built and improved. This internship is designed for people who want to explore product management by working on real product problems. You will work closely with the product team to understand user workflows, identify usability issues, document product behavior, and help shape improvements. Unlike many internships that focus primarily on research or presentations, this role involves hands-on work with the product, engineers, and real users. Working in a startup environment, you will get the opportunity to wear diﬀerent hats, collaborate across teams, and understand how product decisions are made in practice.

What You Will Work On


During the internship, you may work across diﬀerent product areas, including:
Understanding and documenting real user workflows
Identifying UX and usability improvements in existing product flows
Writing product specifications and feature documentation
Helping analyse customer problems and feature requests
Supporting feature testing and release verification
Working with engineers and designers to refine product behaviour
Collaborating with internal teams and occasionally interacting with users to understand how the system is used in the real world
This role is meant to give exposure to how product decisions are actually made in a fast-moving product environment.


What We Are Looking For

We are not looking for a specific degree or background. Instead, we look for people who are:


Curious about how products work
Comfortable breaking down complex problems
Clear thinkers and good communicators
Willing to ask questions and learn quickly
Interested in improving user experiences and workflows
Comfortable working closely with a team in an oﬃce environment
Prior experience in product management is not required.
This role is ideal for someone who enjoys digging into systems, understanding how things work, and finding ways to improve them.


What You Will Learn

By the end of the internship, you will gain exposure to:


How product teams identify and solve user problems
How product requirements and specifications are written
How engineers and product managers collaborate
How real-world software workflows are designed and improved
How product decisions are made in a growing software company


High-performing interns may be considered for a full-time role in the product team.

Application Exercise

Choose one Productivity software product you regularly use (Ex, Notion, Slack, Trello, Google Docs, Calendar, GitHub, etc.).

Identify one workflow that you think could be improved.

Your Response Should Include

a short description of the workflow, the exact step where the problem occurs, why this problem matters for the user one improvement you would propose

Please include 2-3 screenshots of the workflow you are analysing.

You may also mention one improvement idea you considered but rejected. Maximum 300 words.

We review every submission carefully and use this exercise to understand how candidates think about products.

About CrelioHealth

CrelioHealth is a fast-growing health-tech product company delivering cloud-based LIMS, RIS, CRM, and Inventory solutions to diagnostics labs and hospitals globally. We are building scalable systems that power modern healthcare operations.

Website: www.creliohealth.com
Show more

title: Sales Intern
description:
Job Title: Sales Intern

Location: Remote

Duration: 6 months

Stipend: Fixed + Incentives




About the Company

Kuinbee (kuinbee.com) is building a data-on-demand platform that helps businesses access, buy, and generate high-quality datasets without friction. We operate across data marketplaces, custom data collection, and analytics solutions.




Role Overview

We are looking for a high-energy Sales Intern who can help us drive customer acquisition, build pipelines, and close deals. This role is ideal for someone who wants to learn real startup sales, not just theory.




Key Responsibilities
Identify and research potential clients (startups, enterprises, researchers)
Generate leads through LinkedIn, cold emails, and outbound outreach
Assist in building and managing a strong sales pipeline
Conduct discovery calls and understand customer data needs
Pitch Kuinbee’s offerings (datasets, custom data collection, dashboards)
Support closing deals and maintaining client relationships
Maintain CRM and track sales performance
Work closely with founders on GTM and sales strategy


Who Should Apply
Students or recent graduates interested in sales, startups, or business development
Strong communication and persuasion skills
Comfortable with cold outreach and talking to new people
Self-driven, proactive, and result-oriented mindset
Basic understanding of business, data, or tech is a plus


What You’ll Gain
Hands-on experience in B2B sales and startup growth
Direct mentorship from founders (CEO/COO level exposure)
Opportunity to work on real deals and revenue generation
Strong networking opportunities across industries
Potential full-time PPO (Pre-Placement Offer)


Skills (Mandatory)
Experience with LinkedIn outreach or email marketing
Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, Zoho, etc.)
Interest in data, analytics, or AI




How to Apply

Send your resume + a short note on “Why sales?” to: coo@kuinbee.com

Or apply via LinkedIn.

title: Business Development Intern
description:
Company: The Social Ayushi

Location: Remote / Hybrid (as applicable)

Duration: 3–6 Months

Stipend: Performance-based / Fixed (mention if applicable)




About The Social Ayushi




The Social Ayushi is a growing creative and marketing agency focused on helping brands build a strong digital presence through content, strategy, and performance-driven marketing. We work with startups, creators, and businesses to scale their visibility and engagement.




Role Overview




We are looking for a proactive and driven Business Development Intern who can help us expand our client base, generate leads, and contribute to revenue growth. This role is ideal for someone who wants hands-on experience in sales, client communication, and startup growth.




Key Responsibilities




Identify and research potential clients (startups, founders, brands, and businesses)

Generate leads through LinkedIn, Instagram, email outreach, and other channels

Initiate conversations and build relationships with prospects

Assist in pitching services and closing deals

Maintain and update lead database and CRM

Coordinate with the marketing and content team for campaigns

Support in creating proposals, presentations, and sales materials

Track performance metrics and suggest improvements




Who Should Apply




Students or recent graduates in Business, Marketing, or related fields

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

Interest in sales, marketing, and client handling

Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach and social media platforms

Self-motivated, target-driven, and eager to learn

Prior internship or sales experience is a plus (not mandatory)




What You’ll Gain




Hands-on experience in business development and sales

Exposure to real client interactions and deal closures

Opportunity to work closely with founders

Skill development in communication, negotiation, and strategy

Certificate + Letter of Recommendation (based on performance)

Potential full-time opportunity based on performance




How to Apply

Share your resume and a short note on why you're interested in this role at:

📩thesocialayushi@gmail.com

title: Business Development & Sales Intern (Hybrid) – Pune
description:
About Vistoma Digital




Vistoma Digital is a fast-growing, young marketing agency focused on helping brands grow through digital marketing, performance campaigns, and strategic marketing solutions.




We are looking for a motivated Business Development & Sales Intern who is eager to learn how agencies acquire and manage clients. This role is ideal for students pursuing MBA, BBA, or other management-related programs who want hands-on exposure to sales, client acquisition, and business strategy in a real agency environment.







Role Overview

As a Business Development Intern, you will help identify potential clients, generate leads, support sales conversations, and assist in building new business opportunities for the agency.

You will work closely with the founders and marketing team to understand client needs and help convert opportunities into long-term partnerships.







Key Responsibilities
Research and identify potential clients who may benefit from digital marketing services
Generate and qualify leads through outreach, networking, and online research
Assist in initiating conversations with prospective clients via email, LinkedIn, or calls
Support the sales pipeline by tracking leads, follow-ups, and opportunities
Participate in sales discussions and help prepare proposals or presentations
Build and maintain relationships with potential clients and partners
Stay updated on industry trends, marketing services, and competitor offerings
Collaborate with the marketing team to align client requirements with agency services







Who Should Apply
Students currently pursuing MBA, BBA, or other business/management programs
Strong interest in sales, business development, marketing, or entrepreneurship
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable interacting with new people
Organized and able to manage follow-ups and sales activities
Familiarity with LinkedIn or digital tools for outreach is a plus







Work Structure
Hybrid role based in Pune
Flexible work hours that can accommodate your college schedule
Expected to be available during standard working hours at least 2–3 days per week for meetings and collaboration




Compensation
Base stipend
Performance-based incentives linked to successful lead generation and conversions




What You’ll Gain
Real experience in agency sales and client acquisition
Exposure to digital marketing services and business strategy
Opportunity to work closely with a fast-growing startup team
Build practical sales, communication, and negotiation skills
Potential Pre-Placement Offer (PPO) for high-performing interns

title: Influencer Marketing Intern
description:
Company Description


Onyx Digital is a dynamic and forward-thinking digital marketing agency specializing in innovative solutions for businesses to grow their online presence. With a focus on creativity and data-driven strategies, we partner with brands to craft impactful marketing campaigns that drive engagement. Our goal is to empower clients with cutting-edge digital tools and build lasting relationships with their audiences. At Onyx Digital, we foster a collaborative work environment that values passion, creativity, and professional growth.


Role Description


This is a full-time Influencer Marketing Intern role, based on-site in the Pune Division. The intern will support the team in researching and identifying potential influencers across various social media platforms, building and maintaining relationships with influencers, and coordinating influencer campaigns. Daily tasks include drafting outreach messages, analyzing campaign performance, preparing reports, and assisting with administrative tasks as needed. The role offers an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in influencer marketing and social media strategy in a fast-paced and creative environment.


Qualifications

Strong research and analytical skills to identify and evaluate potential influencers and assess campaign performance
Excellent communication skills, with the ability to craft professional outreach messages and effectively collaborate with internal teams and influencers
Understanding of social media platforms, including Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, and other emerging platforms
Organizational and time management skills to handle multiple tasks and meet deadlines
Proficiency in digital tools and software related to social media management, campaign tracking, and analytics is a plus
Pursuing or completed a degree in Marketing, Communications, Social Media, or a related field is preferred

title: Trainee Software Engineer (Frontend) - MedInsight (Dev)
description:
About Milliman

Milliman is among the world's largest providers of actuarial and related products and services. Our mission is to serve our clients to protect the health and financial well-being of people everywhere. Founded in 1947, Milliman is an independent firm with offices in major cities around the globe. We are owned and managed by our principals, senior consultants whose selection is based on their technical, professional, and business achievements. Milliman serves the full spectrum of business, financial, government, union, education, and nonprofit organizations. In addition to our consulting actuaries, Milliman's body of professionals includes numerous other specialists, ranging from clinicians to economists.

We are looking for an enthusiastic Trainee Software Engineer with a desire to grow their knowledge and experience as part of our team.

About Milliman’s MedInsight Team

Leading with our core values of Quality, Integrity, and Opportunity, MedInsight is the healthcare industry’s most trusted solution for healthcare intelligence. Our company’s purpose is to empower easy, data-driven decision-making on important healthcare questions. Through our products, education, and services, MedInsight is making an impact on healthcare by helping to drive better outcomes for patients while reducing waste. Over 300 leading healthcare organizations have come to rely on MedInsight analytic solutions for healthcare cost and care management.

Job Overview

We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Trainee Full Stack Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience working with advanced software development technologies, tools, and frameworks including React., NET, Databricks and Azure. This position is ideal for individuals eager to expand their technical skills, contribute to innovative projects, and grow as professionals in a collaborative environment.

Roles And Responsibilities


Develop a comprehensive understanding of the organization, including its overarching mission, core values, and strategic goals, to ensure alignment in all tasks and responsibilities.
Exhibit a proactive learning attitude during the various training sessions provided, effectively applying the knowledge gained to the projects and products supported throughout the tenure.
Learn and understand the technologies, tools, and frameworks used by the development team to contribute effectively to projects.
Initially, you will work under general guidance, with the opportunity to gradually take on more responsibility and handle tasks independently.
Work effectively as part of a distributed global team, collaborating with colleagues across different time zones and locations.


Key Requirements


Freshers who wish to pick up career opportunities in IT are eligible to apply.
Having knowledge of Redux, Databricks, SQL will be an added advantage.
Must have knowledge of basic frontend technologies including HTML, CSS, OOPS Concepts (Structural language e.g. C#), .NET CORE, JavaScript, React.js and its core principles.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Highly motivated with an eagerness to learn and a sense of ownership and accountability.


Qualification: Any Graduate (B.E, B.Tech, MCA) with less or no experience.

Personal Characteristics

Demonstrate Competencies Including


Teamwork - Work cooperatively and treat clients and co-workers with respect and dignity while valuing individual differences, encouraging new ideas and sharing information.
Commitment to excellence - Demonstrate commitment to being creative, innovative, flexible and adaptable, focusing on quality solutions, continually improving and being a winner.
Attention to Detail – Demonstrate a keen eye for accuracy and thoroughness in all tasks and responsibilities.
Time Management – Effectively prioritize and manage tasks to meet deadlines and maximize productivity.


What We Offer


Hands-on experience working with advanced software development technologies, tools, and frameworks.
Mentorship & Guidance: Receive mentorship from experienced professionals to help you grow in your data engineering career.
Global Collaboration: Join a global team and gain experience working in a distributed environment.
Learning Opportunities: Access to various training and development programs to enhance your skills and knowledge in the field of Software/Web Engineering.

title: Management Trainee
description:
As a Graduate/Management Trainee – User Research, you will play a key role in helping us deeply understand our users. Your primary responsibility will be to connect with students through calls, gather insights on their needs, motivations, and challenges, and translate those conversations into meaningful inputs for our product and business teams. This role is ideal for someone who is curious, empathetic, and comfortable speaking with people every day.







The charter for this role will include:

Conduct telephonic and virtual conversations with students to understand their journeys, needs, and decision-making processes.
Ask the right questions to uncover insights around study abroad aspirations, challenges, and behaviors.
Document and synthesize conversations into clear insights, patterns, and actionable takeaways.
Work closely with product, growth, and business teams to share user feedback and influence decisions.
Continuously improve research quality by refining scripts, questions, and approaches based on learnings.







Ideal Persona would:

Strong communication skills with high comfort in speaking to new people over calls every day.
Naturally curious with the ability to ask thoughtful questions and listen actively.
Empathetic and able to build trust quickly with students from diverse backgrounds.
Structured thinker who can convert conversations into clear insights and patterns.
Self-driven and comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment.







Everyone at Leap is entrepreneurial, moves fast and operates with extreme ownership.

There is minimal management and extreme autonomy.

If the above defines you, you will fight in snugly







What is Leap?

Leap is a global student mobility platform that empowers students’ aspirations for a global career and education

We have built this and this and this

We work at the exciting intersection of fintech & edtech

And we love that we succeed as a business while powering the dreams of talented students!




How far along are we?

We are the leaders in our space by a mile!

We are backed by Sequoia, Jungle Ventures, Owl Ventures & Harvard!

Read the latest fundraise news here




Who are we as people?

We have a lean, rockstar team.

We have come this far with a lean team because we love to increase the talent density with every new member we add. Yes, we are more picky than the usual company.

We hire slowly and deliberately




You can meet our founders here -> Arnav Kumar and Vaibhav Singh

Arnav tweets here

What will you be doing?

We are now building our leadership team and would love to engage

This is a great time to join the rocketship and participate in the upside -




Broadly,

You will be solving complex branding problems
With massive upside if you solve them
In a super fast paced environment that will challenge you
With enough resources to be audacious
And mentorship from an experienced founding team

title: SDE Intern
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a motivated and technically strong SDE Intern to join our engineering team. You'll work on robust systems and workflows that enable internal users and the overall development of the product. You will build backend services, integrate with external APIs, and collaborate with the team to meet their use cases. This is a hands-on role where you'll have the agency to think and act to drive fast/iterative progress across multiple fronts.

What You'll Do

Design and build backend services and APIs that are accessible, fault-tolerant, and well-tested.
Integrate with third-party and internal APIs to extend product capabilities.
Work with AI agents and LLM-powered workflows, applying sound engineering practices (testing, validation, guardrails) to ensure robustness
Write and reason through unit and integration tests, thinking critically about coverage, edge cases, and failure modes.
Collaborate with senior engineers on system design, service orchestration, and architectural decisions.
Work with data stores and infrastructure tooling relevant to the stack.

What We're Looking For

Must Have

A strong portfolio of personal or academic technical projects, with a clear backend focus (bonus if any are live or deployed).
Proficiency in Python and/or a solid grasp of an end-to-end backend stack; full-stack experience is a plus.
Experience integrating with external APIs (REST, GraphQL, webhooks, etc.).
A testing mindset, ability to think about how to validate, test, and harden implementations rather than just writing code that works on the happy path.

Good to Have

Familiarity with common backend tooling: SQL/NoSQL databases, Redis (caching), message queues (e.g. Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS), and search platforms like OpenSearch/Elasticsearch
Exposure to AI agents or LLM-based systems, with an understanding of how they work and where they can fail.
Docker / container basics.
Git and collaborative development workflows.
Familiarity with any cloud provider (AWS, GCP, Azure).

Bonus Points

Experience building MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.
Experience designing fault-tolerant or resilient workflows that can recover gracefully from failures without data loss (e.g. idempotent jobs, retry logic).
General understanding of ML concepts, enough to engage meaningfully with product requirements and the models powering our systems.

What You'll Gain

Ownership of features that are aimed at varying use-cases.
Agency to take decisions to meet requirements.
Exposure to modern AI/LLM engineering practices.
Mentorship from senior engineers across backend, ML, and platform.
Experience working within an agile team on meaningful work.

title: Graduate Apprentice Trainee
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

ROLE & RESPONSIBILITY

This role is designed for fresh graduates stepping into the Construction Equipment industry for the first time. The program aims to provide hands-on experience, product knowledge, and exposure to real-time customer interactions while supporting Volvo CE and dealership business objectives.

Location: Delhi

Key Responsibilities

Support the dealer sales team in day-to-day sales activities and field operations

Assist in monthly sales forecasting and tracking sales leads

Gain detailed product knowledge of Volvo construction equipment

Participate in customer meetings and site visits with senior sales staff

Learn to build customer relationships and handle basic queries

Collect market intelligence on competitors and customer needs

Support execution of local marketing initiatives and promotions

Work with product support teams to understand aftermarket services

Capture learnings and insights from field visits for reporting and training

Skills & Competencies Required

Strong willingness to learn and adapt

Good communication skills (spoken and written)

Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

Positive attitude with a customer-centric mindset

Willingness to travel and work in field environments

Team player with proactive approach

Basic understanding of construction equipment applications

Educational Qualification

Graduate Degree in:

Engineering (Mechanical / Automobile) OR

Business Management (Marketing / Sales)

Who We Are & What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. This mission creates opportunities across our global network of brands and teams.

By joining Volvo Group, you will work with some of the brightest minds in the industry, contributing to building a better future for society. We believe in teamwork, inclusiveness, and continuous growth.

Volvo Construction Equipment, part of the Volvo Group, is driven by the purpose of building the world we want to live in. Together, we create solutions for a cleaner, smarter, and more connected future.

We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

Who We Are And What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join Volvo Group. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

Part of Volvo Group, Volvo Construction Equipment is a global company driven by our purpose to build the world we want to live in. Together we develop and deliver solutions for a cleaner, smarter, and more connected world. By unleashing everyone’s full potential, we build a more sustainable future for all our stakeholders. Come join our team and help us build a better tomorrow.

title: Management Trainee Human Resources
description:
DevsLane is currently seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Management Trainee – HR to join our team. This role offers hands-on exposure across recruitment, HR operations, coordination, and cultural initiatives. You’ll work closely with internal teams and leadership, gradually taking ownership of key HR functions.

Job Responsibilities

Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

Source, screen, and filter candidate profiles.
Conduct HR screening rounds to assess communication, fit, and motivation.
Coordinate interview schedules and maintain candidate feedback loops.
Track candidate pipelines and recruitment metrics using Google Sheets and our internal ERP/ATS.

Communication & Coordination

Manage careers inbox and respond to candidate and team queries.
Draft HR-related communications and assist in internal coordination.
Liaise with internal teams and external partners for HR support.

HR Operations & Documentation

Assist onboarding and offboarding processes.
Prepare and maintain HR documents and data records.
Ensure confidentiality and timely updates of all documentation.

Learning, Projects & Exposure

Work on special projects involving employer branding, internal campaigns, and HR communication — including content creation, testimonials, and initiatives that promote DevsLane’s mission and culture.
Participate in structured rotations across domains (HR, Operations, Sales, Marketing, Admin).
Propose process improvements and refine templates and documentation workflows.
Support administrative operations such as vendor coordination, maintenance, stationery, and travel arrangements.
Assist with meeting scheduling, visitor management, and reception coordination when required.
Desired Profile

Eligibility & Experience

Fresh post-graduates (Class of 2025) OR early-career professionals with up to 2 years of experience in HR, operations, or coordination.
Excellent written and spoken English, with strong documentation and organizational skills.
Proficiency in Google Docs and Google Sheets.
Eagerness to learn, take ownership, and grow in a dynamic environment.
Willingness to travel occasionally for campus drives, team events, or office coordination.

Preferred (Not Mandatory)

Exposure or interest in Sales, Client Coordination, or Employer Branding.
Familiarity with ATS tools and collaboration platforms (Slack, Trello, etc.).
Ability to manage structured communication and process documentation efficiently.
Skills Required
Communication A+
Documentation A+
HR Operations & Ground-level Coordination
Recruitment & Candidate Screening
Client Feedback Loop Management
Inbox & Process Handling
Compensation Range

INR 1,80,000 – 3,60,000 PA (based on candidature and profile)

Working Days & Hours

Monday to Friday | 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM

Location

Dehradun (near IT Park)

How to Apply

Fill out the form here 👉 https://forms.gle/NsmF95mpvKewEiFW8

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further rounds.

🎥 Note – Video Submission (Mandatory)

This Google Form requests a short 60-second video submission in two parts.

Please ensure access is shared with careers@devslane.com

or set visibility to “Anyone with the link.”

Part 1 – Introduction (First 30 seconds):

Briefly introduce yourself — your name, background, and why you’re interested in the HR role at DevsLane.

Part 2 – Situation Response (Next 30 seconds):

Imagine an employee has several unused leaves at year-end but the team has urgent client deadlines.

How would you handle this situation without making the employee feel their right to take leaves is being denied, while still ensuring client commitments are met?

Contact Us

Email: careers@devslane.com

Website: www.devslane.com

title: CS Trainee
description:
Opportunity: Company Secretary Management Trainee (21 Months) - Institute of Company Secretaries of India

Firm: ESG INTEGRAR (Legal & Compliance Firm) Location: Rohini, Sector 11, New Delhi – 110085

Are you ready to dive into the future of corporate governance? We are looking for two (02) dedicated and inquisitive CS Trainees to join our growing legal practice. If you are passionate about research, global compliance, and the emerging world of ESG, we want to hear from you.




📚 What You Will Learn (Work Exposure)

We offer a high-learning environment focused on niche and global practice areas:

Core Governance: Regulatory Compliance & Internal regulatory Compliance Audits, E-Com Audits
Specialized Laws: Labour Laws, Legal Metrology, Environment Laws, Data Privacy, International Laws (APAC Region), Asset Due Diligence and Real Estate Advisory, BIS, E-Commerce
Global Reach: FEMA & Compliance frameworks for the Asia Pacific Regions.
The Future of CS: ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) Advisory.
Legal Craft: Intensive Law Research and Professional English Drafting.

Note on Focus: Our firm specializes in private-sector consulting.

Who We Are Looking For

Level: Executive/Professional passed students eligible for 21 months of mandatory training.
Skills: Good command of the English language (written & verbal) and a knack for deep-dive research.
Proximity: Candidates residing in or near North/West Delhi (Rohini/Pitampura) are highly preferred.
Mindset: A "can-do" attitude with a willingness to work in a fast-paced, 6-day workweek environment.

💰 Stipend & Benefits

Stipend: ₹10,000 to ₹15,000 per month (Commensurate with your knowledge and skills).
Mentorship: Direct reporting to a practicing CS Professional.
Global Exposure: Hands-on experience with international compliance standards.

📩 How to Apply

Ready to kickstart your career? Send your updated CV with a brief cover note to: 📧 connect@esgintegrar.com
